allowed_claims.label: Robust time-window service-menu framework is implemented
allowed_claims.rationale: Core menu logic, contracts, paired replay schema, and artifact gates exist in the repository.

allowed_claims.label: Robust ETA pruning and soft-penalty modes are available
allowed_claims.rationale: The method can describe hard, calibrated, interval-overlap, chance-constraint, soft-penalty, and none modes.

allowed_claims.label: Exact-small and greedy-large menu construction is auditable
allowed_claims.rationale: Solver diagnostics record fallback, gap, overlap, candidate count, and build-time metadata.

allowed_claims.label: Paired replay contracts are defined for fair policy comparisons
allowed_claims.rationale: Study contracts require shared traces, seeds, checkpoints, pricing, and HGS settings.

allowed_claims.label: Artifact status and blockers are reported transparently
allowed_claims.rationale: Phase 4 status artifacts expose blocked, incomplete, placeholder, checkpoint, and provenance state.

blocked_claims.label: Robust menu universally dominates all baselines
blocked_claims.reason: Universal dominance is stronger than any bounded simulation or diagnostic artifact can support.

blocked_claims.label: The choice model is validated on real passenger behavior
blocked_claims.reason: No external survey or revealed-preference validation is part of v1.

blocked_claims.label: No-filter is recommended as an operational policy
blocked_claims.reason: no_filter_diagnostic is a diagnostic upper bound or stress test, not an operational recommendation.

blocked_claims.label: The full dynamic DRT system is solved exactly
blocked_claims.reason: Exact enumeration is limited to small menu candidate sets, with greedy fallback for larger sets.

blocked_claims.label: Robust menu empirically improves profit, acceptance, or opt-out versus baselines
blocked_claims.reason: Current artifact status is not claim-ready.

blocked_claims.label: Pilot/formal experiments are complete and support manuscript results
blocked_claims.reason: Current artifact status is blocked or incomplete.

blockers.message: Required checkpoint file is unavailable; refusing random-weight evidence.
Formal evidence was skipped for this Phase 4 run; formal claim readiness is false.

conditional_claims.label: Pilot/formal effect-size conclusions
conditional_claims.required_status: claim_ready plus pilot or formal claim readiness
